title: Imelda Frayre
compiled_truth: Imelda Frayre is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2002-01-03), Imelda Frayre sent 6 and received 124 emails, totalling 130 interactions. Top correspondents: [Faye Ellis](people/faye-ellis) (3), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (2), [Leslie Hansen](people/leslie-hansen) (2), [Claudia Clark](people/claudia-clark) (2), [Lisa Lees](people/lisa-lees) (2).
